title: versioning — compliance evidence
description: Versioning is the direct enforcement point for RFC 8594 (Sunset header) + surfaces GDPR Art. 5 / Art. 30 evidence (records of processing). Customer notifications on deprecation provide GDPR Art. 13/14 informing-of-processing-changes coverage.

controls.evidence: API versions declare their surface (rest/webhook/graphql) + affected endpoints/events in DeprecationNotice. When we deprecate an endpoint that processes PII, the notice + migration guide document what the successor endpoint does with the same data.
Notice text edits produce HasVersions snapshots — the exact text customers saw at each point in time is recoverable.
When an API version changes what data it collects (via a new endpoint), the deprecation notice + migration guide informs affected customers before the change.
Webhook payload transformations may reshape what fields a subscriber receives. Deprecation notices declare `affected_events` so subscribers know their integrations will change.
ApiVersion + DeprecationNotice + all lifecycle events audit-logged + retained 7y cold. Full trail of what changed, when, and why.
Version resolution + transformer chains happen server-side; consumers never see raw v-current payloads when pinned. Data-shape confidentiality preserved across version bumps.
SunsetHeaderEmitter emits `Sunset: <RFC 7231 date>` on every response from a deprecated version. Enforced by versioning.resolve middleware.
Emits `Deprecation: true` alongside Sunset. Per RFC 8594bis (draft).
Emits `Link: <migration-guide-url>; rel="successor-version"` when the ApiVersion has migration_target_slug + migration_guide_url set.
feature-flags.json ships kill switches per resolver, per transformer chain, per sunset enforcement. Every kill-switch flip audit-logged.

ApiVersion + DeprecationNotice both compose HasVersions — every text edit produces a rollback-capable snapshot. Every state transition audit-logged with actor + timestamp. Complete change management trail for version lifecycle.
policies.json restricts lifecycle transitions (release/deprecate/sunset) to super_admin. Notice publishing to super_admin. Regular platform admins cannot alter version state.
Version catalog IS configuration — changes tracked in audit + HasVersions snapshots.
